expectations.text: Adds a confirmModal (or similar) state to the existing state machine via iota
Uses lipgloss.Place() with lipgloss.Center alignment to center the modal
expectations.evidence: No lipgloss.Place() used — dialog is rendered inline as a styled box appended below the list content

expectations.text: Modal has a border (lipgloss.RoundedBorder or similar)
The background list content is rendered underneath the modal (not blank)
expectations.evidence: In deleteConfirmView state, list items are rendered first then dialog is appended below — list IS visible

expectations.text: Keyboard input in the confirmModal state only handles y/n/esc — other keys are not forwarded to the list
expectations.evidence: deleteConfirmView case only handles y, n, esc with no fallthrough

expectations.text: Pressing y triggers a delete action and returns to listView
expectations.evidence: case "y": removes note from slice and sets m.state = listView

expectations.text: Pressing n or esc cancels and returns to listView
